task_completion.description: Configure Screaming Frog to crawl the target URL with AMP validation enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog SEO Spider UI showing 'https://crawler-test.com/' in the URL bar and evidence of a crawl in progress or completed. The AMP tab or AMP validation settings should be visible or active.

task_completion.description: AMP audit data is successfully generated in Screaming Frog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog UI displaying the 'AMP' tab or AMP-specific filters with populated data (URLs, status, or errors) from crawler-test.com.

task_completion.description: Export the AMP audit data to a CSV file in the correct directory with 'amp' in the filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or save dialog showing a .csv file with 'amp' in its name (e.g., amp_audit.csv) located in the '~/Documents/SEO/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Create the AMP audit report text file in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing a file named 'amp_audit_report.txt' located in '~/Documents/SEO/reports/'.

task_completion.description: The report includes the total count of AMP pages identified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'amp_audit_report.txt' explicitly state a number representing the total count of AMP pages found during the crawl.

task_completion.description: The report lists at least two specific AMP errors found.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'amp_audit_report.txt' list at least two distinct AMP validation errors (e.g., 'Missing Canonical', 'Missing Non-AMP Return Link', 'Validation Error').

integrity.description: The agent used the Screaming Frog GUI to perform the crawl and export.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the actual Screaming Frog SEO Spider application interface being used, rather than just terminal commands or mocked text files.

integrity.description: The crawl data appears to be genuinely fetched from the target website.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Screaming Frog interface should show real URLs from 'crawler-test.com' and realistic crawl metrics, not empty tables or manually typed dummy data.

integrity.description: The data in the report plausibly matches the tool's output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The errors and counts written in the text report should align with the data visible in the Screaming Frog interface or the exported CSV file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://crawler-test.com/. Export Directory: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports. Report Path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/amp_audit_report.txt. Required CSV filename substring: 'amp'. Expected AMP errors typically found on this site include 'Missing Canonical', 'Missing Non-AMP Return Link', and 'Validation Error'.
